name: Giovanni's Shrimp Truck
tagline: The OG garlic shrimp truck since 1993 — scrawl your name on the side and join the legend.
mustOrder: scampi (garlic butter) — the dish that made them famous
talkStory: Started 1993 by Giovanni and Donna Aragon — a white van on the roadside in Kahuku that launched the entire North Shore shrimp truck industry. Don't wear a nice shirt — garlic butter splatters are inevitable. Combine with Romy's (1 mile up road) for the ultimate shrimp comparison.
